description: Fabric data agent for employee knowledge graph exploration.
samplePrompts: Show all assets for EMP014 and average confidence score by format.
Which department has the lowest average document confidence this month?
List employees with OneNote assets containing safety-related terms.
Find managers with more than 20 direct and indirect reports.
Show top 10 employees by number of parsed documents.
What are the most common document categories in R&D?
Get all emails mentioning procurement delays and owner employees.
Compare confidence scores between PDF and DOCX for Operations.
List employees who own at least one PPTX and one OneNote document.
Find assets with confidence below 0.70 and suggest reprocessing order.
Show org hierarchy path for EMP077.
Which skills correlate with high confidence parsing results?
Display all documents mapped to project codenames in Engineering.
Find stale assets not modified in the last 120 days.
Show confidence rollup by section metadata/content/entities.
List all assets loaded to OneLake but missing Cosmos DB parse results.
Identify employees with cross-department collaboration emails.
Show average confidence trend by week for Finance.
Find top 5 entities extracted from OneNote records.
Generate briefing summary for manager EMP004 team knowledge assets.
